text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the spring Tenno Sho—one of the
most important races to the Mejiro family—has
arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright, bursting with motivation, vows to
run the same way Mejiro McQueen did when she
won.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If successful, she'll become the first Mejiro since
McQueen to win the spring Tenno Sho. The
curtains are about to rise over a very important
stage.
